resolutionNote: Refrigerator exterior added to break room checklist with photo confirmation required. Phil confirmed satisfied.

description: Medical plaza director reported that a suite on the 2nd floor was cleaned out of spec — incorrect products used in an allergy practice, causing a tenant complaint.
Cleaning crew accessed a restricted patient records room in suite 305 — door was unlocked but access is outside scope. HIPAA review initiated with building director.
resolutionNote: Crew retrained on suite scope boundaries. All restricted rooms now marked with signage per building management's update. Dr. O'Brien satisfied with response.

description: Score 69/100. Suite 205 allergy practice scored 52 — incorrect products documented. Common areas and lobby passed. Per-suite spec sheet now mandatory.
resolutionNote: Re-inspection Jan 14 scored 85/100. Per-suite spec sheet implemented and confirmed by supervisor before each shift. Issue resolved.

description: Monthly supply delivery — HIPAA-compliant, suite-specific cleaning products per individual tenant specs for medical plaza.
resolutionNote: All items delivered and labeled by suite. Signed off by building director.

description: Fatima Hassan assigned to Centennial Medical Plaza route. HIPAA certification confirmed. Blood-borne pathogen training completed. Orientation Feb 10. 43 days in — Yellow monitoring window.
